summary: Agent B for bidirectional swap between spec files and map-phase findings. Loads directory summaries and spec files, builds prompt, calls LLM to produce SwapReport comparing spec expectations against ground truth findings.

findings.description: If JSON parsing fails after retries, the function returns None without saving error details or partial results, making debugging difficult.
findings.evidence:
if attempt < config.max_retries:
    input_text += f"\n\n[CORRECTION] Output was invalid: {e}. Re-emit only the JSON object."
    continue
logger.error("Swap phase failed after %d attempts", config.max_retries + 1)
return None

findings.description: General Exception catch-all swallows all unexpected errors (including KeyboardInterrupt) and returns None, potentially hiding critical failures.
No validation on spec file size or content length; large spec files could exceed token limits or cause memory issues when building prompt.
Concurrent writes to the same _swap_report.json file if multiple swap processes run simultaneously could corrupt the output.
Wide exception handler catches all exceptions when loading summaries; individual malformed JSON files cause entire summaries to be skipped silently.
The code strips Markdown code fences naively: if the first line starts with '```' but the last line doesn't end with '```', it removes only the first line, potentially leaving malformed JSON.

interfaces_exported: run_swap(findings_root: Path, spec_files: list[Path], client: LLMClient, config: Config) -> SwapReport | None
explicit_requirements: Agent B never reads source code. It reads spec files and reduced directory summaries
Spec files: CLAUDE.md, EVAL_SPEC.md, .allium files, etc.
findings_root must contain reduced phase summaries (SUMMARY_FILENAME)
swap phase skipped if no readable spec files
JSON output wrapped in markdown code fences may be stripped
Retry up to config.max_retries times on JSON/validation errors

implicit_assumptions.assumption: findings_root contains only valid SUMMARY_FILENAME files generated by reduce phase (no unrelated JSON files)
implicit_assumptions.risk: If other .json files match SUMMARY_FILENAME pattern, they will be loaded and cause validation errors or pollute summaries list.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: config.prompt("swap") returns a valid system prompt string that instructs LLM to output JSON matching SwapReport schema
implicit_assumptions.risk: If prompt is malformed or empty, LLM output will be garbage and swap will fail after retries.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: DirectorySummary.contradictions and DirectorySummary.escalated_flags fields are always present (maybe empty lists)
implicit_assumptions.risk: If DirectorySummary model changes or those fields are missing, _build_swap_input will raise AttributeError.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: Spec files are text files with reasonable encoding (UTF-8); binary or corrupted files will be handled by errors='replace'
implicit_assumptions.risk: Binary spec files may produce garbage content that pollutes the prompt but won't crash.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: LLMClient.complete will either return a string or raise an exception; it never returns None
implicit_assumptions.risk: If client returns None, json.loads(None) will raise TypeError, caught as general Exception and swap fails.
Permission denied when writing report will raise OSError, caught by general Exception handler, swap fails silently.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: Spec file names (p.name) are unique across the list; duplicates won't cause confusion in spec_names
implicit_assumptions.risk: Duplicate spec file names in spec_names list may mislead about which files were actually used.

implicit_assumptions.assumption: DirectorySummary.directory is a string suitable for display in markdown header
implicit_assumptions.risk: If directory contains backticks or special markdown characters, the prompt formatting may break.

cross_file_flags: swap assumes .reduce.SUMMARY_FILENAME is a constant string; verify its value in reduce.py.
swap assumes .schema.SwapReport.model_validate works with extra fields; verify schema validation behavior.
swap assumes config has attributes swap_model, swap_max_tokens, max_retries; verify Config class in config.py.
swap uses .client.LLMClient.complete with specific signature; verify client.py implementation matches.
